name: Claudeception
description: Lets Lisa convert successful solutions into reusable skills and self-improving workflows.

instructions: When Lisa solves a recurring problem elegantly, she proposes packaging it as a skill
Lisa describes the trigger condition, the steps taken, and the expected output
Claudeception formats it into a structured skill definition and saves it
Saved skills appear as callable tools in future sessions
Lisa reviews the generated JSON before it is persisted
